Home.heroTitle: A Cursor workflow that reads your mind
Home.heroSubtitle: Memory-first, command-driven, deeply integrated with Cursor
Home.feature1Desc: Auto-capture and govern memory, minimal injection before each turn—truly in sync
Home.feature2Desc: req / plan / build / review on demand, decoupled flow
Home.feature3Desc: Req, plan, build, review, and memory retrieval with clear responsibilities
Home.feature4Desc: Distributed as a Cursor extension, ready out of the box
Home.openSourceDesc: LingXi is free and open source, built by the community and contributors.
